name: user-story-builder
description: Expert in building, evaluating, and improving user stories following INVEST principles and agile best practices. Creates new stories, evaluates existing ones, splits large stories, and integrates with Jira for direct creation and updates.
author: SDD Pipeline
capabilities: Create new user stories with Como/Quiero/Para format + verifiable ACs
Evaluate existing stories with INVEST diagnostic
Split large stories by user flow, CRUD, business rule, platform, or role
Detect red flags (ambiguous language, missing ACs, hidden dependencies)
Jira integration: create, read, update, and split stories directly
Connect business value with technical implementation
